name: Carl
description: A big man, 6 foot 3 and around 230 pounds, ex-Coast-Guard build, short dark hair, several days of stubble, tired and grimly determined. An ordinary human dragged into the dungeon in the middle of a freezing night.
referencePrompt: Neutral standing reference of Carl: a large athletic man, 6'3" and ~230 lbs, short dark hair, stubble, wearing boxer shorts and a heavy black leather jacket, bare-legged, unimpressed cold expression.
notes: Iconic Book-1 look: pulled outside during the collapse in boxer shorts and a leather jacket, wearing his ex's too-small pink Crocs which he soon loses (then barefoot). No pants for the whole book. Refine against the text as the story progresses.
